title: Architecture & Planning → TASK_PLAN.md
description: Design architecture, database schema, and API endpoints for the budget manager app

requirements: Simple CRUD for expenses/income (create, read, update, delete transactions)
Each transaction has: type (income/expense), amount, category, description, date
Monthly summary logic: total income, total expenses, net balance, category breakdowns
RESTful API with proper HTTP status codes and error handling
100% test coverage of core business logic
